sections.heading: How to Set Shortcut Key in Cadence Allegro PCB Editor?
sections.text: Blog > How to Set Shortcut Key in Cadence Allegro PCB Editor? How to Set Shortcut Key in Cadence Allegro PCB Editor? by: Mia Sep 25,2023 18310 Views 0 Comments Posted in PCB Design Tutorial shortcut key Allegro PCB Editor Setting shortcut key in Allegro can significantly improve work efficiency and lower body burden. In this article, we will introduce the three methods to set shortcut key: Directly defined in the Allegro PCB Editor command window; By modifying the user variable env file; Define strokes as shortcut keys. Directly Defined in the Allegro PCB Editor Command Window This kind of shortcut key can only be used in the present design and will be invalid if restarting the software. Th...

sections.heading: Directly Defined in the Allegro PCB Editor Command Window
sections.text: Setting shortcut key in Allegro can significantly improve work efficiency and lower body burden. In this article, we will introduce the three methods to set shortcut key: Directly defined in the Allegro PCB Editor command window; By modifying the user variable env file; Define strokes as shortcut keys. Directly Defined in the Allegro PCB Editor Command Window This kind of shortcut key can only be used in the present design and will be invalid if restarting the software. The command format is as follows: alias F2 add connect funckey a add connect For example, set the shortcut key for routing command. As shown in the figure below, enter alias F2 add connect in the command window, and press En...
